resources.string: Uploading your Photo please wait a moment...
Please stand upright in a well-lit area and ensure your entire body is visible in the frame.
We\'re experiencing high traffic at the moment. Please try again in a few minutes.
Do you really want to log out from your account?
This will permanently delete all your try-on results and clear previous data.\nYou will be returned to the Home screen and will need to start the try-on process again from the beginning.
Smile Your Virtual TryOn Begins Now

For the most accurate outfit try-on:
 • Stand straight 
• Face the camera 
• Keep hands down 
• Ensure good lighting 
Incorrect poses may affect fitting results.
You have unsaved settings. If you go back now, your changes will be lost. Are you sure you want to continue?
